ai_summary: Bliss GVS Pharma Ltd. has allotted 1,87,750 new equity shares to employees who exercised stock options under its 2019 ESOP, increasing the total outstanding shares to 10,62,43,972. This corporate action results in a minor dilution of approximately 0.18% for existing shareholders and generates a cash inflow of Rs. 80.73 lakhs for the company at an exercise price of Rs. 43 per share. As a routine employee benefit initiative designed for retention and motivation, this announcement presents no immediate red flags.
